ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_quotes" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "first" REAL /* First price of the stock */,
  "last" REAL /* Last price of the stock */,
  "change" REAL /* Price change of the stock */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change of the stock */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the portfolio */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User who owns the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "portfolio_id" TEXT /* Portfolio that holds the stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* User who set the alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_metrics" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid */,
  "splits" REAL /* Stock splits */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "date")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the stock exchange
Currency used in the stock exchange
Stock exchange where the stock is listed
Stock exchange where the stock is listed
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
Timestamp when the portfolio was created
Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated
Price at which the stock was purchased
Date when the stock was purchased
Timestamp when the alert was created
Adjusted close price of the stock
